scripts.init:app: docker compose up --build -d && echo 'Waiting for app...' && for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -s http://localhost:3000/health > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'App is ready at http://localhost:3000' && break; echo "Waiting... ($$i/30)"; sleep 2; done
scripts.reset: docker compose down -v && npm run init:app
scripts.dev:app: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build -d && echo 'Waiting for app...' && for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -s http://localhost:3000/health > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'App ready (HMR) at http://localhost:3000' && break; echo "Waiting... ($$i/30)"; sleep 2; done
